Notes: Single UPDATE adds an A RR at host2.campus.edu. and also deletes the entire host2.campus.edu. name in the same message, with no prerequisites, to probe whether delete_name dominates, the add is resurrected, or the packet is rejected.

Steps.Description: Conflicting same-owner operations: add an A RR at host2.campus.edu. and delete the entire host2.campus.edu. name in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host2.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether host2.campus.edu. survives with the added A RR, is removed entirely, or yields an error state.

Steps.Name: host2.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the full post-update name state for host2.campus.edu. after the conflicting UPDATE.
